name: SC-001: Successful Login Redirects to Inventory
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce and verify the inventory page heading Products is visible.

name: SC-002: Cart Badge Updates After Add to Cart
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the Add to cart button for Sauce Labs Backpack, and verify the shopping cart badge displays 1.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the Add to cart button for Sauce Labs Backpack, and verify the cart badge shows 1.

name: SC-003: Cart Page Lists Added Product
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the cart icon, and verify the heading Your Cart is visible.

name: SC-004: Sort by Price Low to High
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, select Price (low to high) from the sort dropdown, and verify the price $7.99 is visible.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, select Price (low to high) from the sort dropdown, and verify the price $7.99 is visible as the first item.

name: SC-005: Unauthenticated Access Blocked
objective: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html without logging in and verify the login form is visible.
